'''Jah-kii Vaargaz''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] wanted alive by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for being an informant for many criminal organizations, including a crimelord called [[Kram Balut]] the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]]. The bounty was 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] which was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Char-stub}}
